overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit walking through a space station corridor into a lounge area, passing an NPC, and stopping at a large observation window overlooking a planet and orbiting station structures.

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the large observation window, gazing out at a massive planet and the surrounding space station structures, while the camera slowly pans to capture the expansive view of space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial corridor into a spacious observation lounge overlooking a planetary vista. It begins by trailing a character in a spacesuit through a narrow hallway lined with yellow cylindrical tanks and metal storage cabinets. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a lounge area featuring a pool table and an arcade machine, passing a stationary NPC. The camera then follows the character toward a massive observation window, shifting from the interior lighting of the station to the deep darkness of the void. Finally, the view expands as the camera pans across the glass to reveal a colossal planet and the intricate structures of the orbiting station.
